reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Great, except for the lines and the gas station attendant who insisted I couldn't pay with my phone using contactless payment on the card machine. When we tried and it worked, he didn't even apologize. The advantage is that the cost is much lower than in Brazil.

(Original)
Ótimo, exceto pelas filas e o frentista que insistiu que eu não conseguiria pagar com o celular usando aproximação na máquina de cartão. Quando fizemos a tentativa e deu certo, nem se desculpou. Vantagem é que o custo é bem menor que no Brasil.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5N01EaFV3EAE
